title: Plant Infection with Xanthomonas Campestris Campestris
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2ucl4","text":"Plant infection of three week old plants with Xanthomonas Campestris Campestris. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":46,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"eergi","text":"Depending on the country, X. campestris may be an quarantine organism. Please make sure you follow the specific guidelines of your country. materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3m6il","text":"At leastthree-week-oldBrassica oleraceaplants in climate chamber","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"85vtm","text":"Scissors ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7tbqn","text":"O/N culture X. campestris ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":12,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Make at least 40 mL of overnight culture of Xanthomonas Campestris Campestris at 28 °C
Dissolve pellet in H2O until an OD600 of 1. Make sure you have at least 30 mL of diluted culture.
Dip sterilized scissors in diluted culture and cut of the tip of a leave (about 1 cm). Make sure to cut over the central vein. Repeat this for each leaf you want to infect.
creator: Cleo B.
